study.journal: Schmidt M, et al. Prone Positioning During Extracorporeal Membrane Oxygenation in Patients With Severe ARDS: The PRONECMO Randomized Clinical Trial. JAMA. 2023 Dec 1;330(24):2343–2353.

population_context.population_description: Patients with severe acute respiratory distress syndrome requiring extracorporeal membrane oxygenation support in ICU settings.

outcome_effect.outcome_name: Not specified in provided abstract text

strengths: Multicentre study involving international ECMO network
limitations: Primary outcomes and detailed results not available in provided abstract text
Sample size not reported in provided text

applicability.generalizability_notes: Findings apply to patients with severe ARDS requiring ECMO support in ICU settings across multiple centres.
